notes: Refreshes the Codex model suggestions for the GPT-5.6 line. Codex's server-refreshed model list dropped gpt-5.3-codex and gpt-5.2 outright and hid gpt-5.4 and gpt-5.4-mini, so the picker now suggests GPT-5.6-Sol, GPT-5.6-Terra, GPT-5.6-Luna and GPT-5.5. The field remains free text, so any slug is still enterable — but a project pinned to one of the removed slugs will now pass a dead --model to Codex and should be repointed.
